message:
fix(ci,deps): stabilize crate publishing with retry logic and explicit versions

Add version = "0.1.0" to all 12 internal workspace dependencies to
enable deterministic crates.io publishing. Replace separate preflight
dry-run CI step with integrated retry loop (5 attempts, 20s backoff)
within the actual publish step for improved fault tolerance against
transient crate.io availability issues. Simplify publish sequence
example to dependency-order guidance pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -563,7 +563,8 @@ jobs:
 
           if [[ -z "${CRATES_PUBLISH_SEQUENCE:-}" ]]; then
             echo "Repository variable CRATES_PUBLISH_SEQUENCE must be set when ENABLE_CRATES_PUBLISH=true." >&2
-            echo "Example: frankensearch-core frankensearch-embed frankensearch-index frankensearch-lexical frankensearch-fusion frankensearch-rerank frankensearch" >&2
+            echo "Example: frankensearch-core" >&2
+            echo "Use dependency order and include only crates whose dependencies are already available on crates.io." >&2
             exit 1
           fi
 
@@ -589,15 +590,6 @@ jobs:
           echo "sequence=${CRATES_PUBLISH_SEQUENCE}" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"
           echo "version=${version}" >> "${GITHUB_OUTPUT}"
 
-      - name: Preflight dry-run for crates publish sequence
-        shell: bash
-        run: |
-          set -euo pipefail
-          for crate in ${{ steps.publish_plan.outputs.sequence }}; do
-            echo "Dry-run publish preflight for ${crate}"
-            cargo publish -p "${crate}" --locked --dry-run
-          done
-
       - name: Publish crates in dependency order
         shell: bash
         env:
@@ -610,6 +602,16 @@ jobs:
             exit 1
           fi
           for crate in ${{ steps.publish_plan.outputs.sequence }}; do
+            for attempt in 1 2 3 4 5; do
+              if cargo publish -p "${crate}" --locked --dry-run; then
+                break
+              fi
+              if [[ "${attempt}" -eq 5 ]]; then
+                echo "Dry-run publish checks failed for ${crate} after ${attempt} attempts." >&2
+                exit 1
+              fi
+              sleep 20
+            done
             echo "Publishing ${crate} (${RELEASE_VERSION})"
             cargo publish -p "${crate}" --locked --token "${CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN}"
             sleep 30
